title: Large Language Models: Where Are We Heading?
desc: Seminar on capabilities, limitations, and future directions of LLMs like GPT and Claude with live demos.

title: Graph Neural Networks in Practice
desc: Deep dive into GCN, GAT, and ST-GNN architectures with real-world application examples and code walkthroughs.

title: AI Adoption in the Iraqi Tech Sector
desc: Panel discussion with industry professionals on challenges and opportunities of AI adoption in Iraq.

title: Open Discussion: Bias and Fairness in AI
desc: Student-led roundtable on algorithmic bias, fairness metrics, and the societal implications of AI systems.

title: Transformer Models Beyond NLP
desc: Exploring the application of transformer architectures in vision, audio, and multimodal tasks.

title: Reinforcement Learning: Theory and Applications
desc: Overview of RL algorithms including Q-Learning, PPO, and their real-world applications.
